The contact owns a 2022 Hyundai Ioniq Hybrid. The contact stated that while driving at various speeds and while passing a nearby vehicle on the left lane or while a street sign was nearby on the right side, the vehicle would independently apply the brakes without the brake pedal

narrative.headline: What 2022 Hyundai Ioniq Hybrid owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 21 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Service Brakes (62% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
